archetype: Modified Archetype 1 (Organic & Earthy - Warm Polleria Style)

headings.strategy: Expressive but clean for dashboard panels. Do not use Inter or generic sans. Tight tracking for sizes over 32px (tracking-tight).

body.strategy: High legibility, geometric body with increased tracking for dense tables.

typography.hierarchy_rules: H1 max text-4xl. H2 text-2xl. Body text-sm to text-base for dense tables. Overlines uppercase + tracking-[0.2em] + text-xs.

colors.rules: Avoid pure black and pure white where possible; use tinted warm neutrals. The 'Tinted Grey' rule applies. Background base is a very soft warm cream. Surfaces are white with subtle warm borders.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Use standard Tailwind scale but apply generous padding for main content areas (p-8). Dense inside tables (py-2 px-3).
layout_and_spacing.grid_strategy: Control Room Grid (Mode B). Dense, data-correlation focused. Base grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with gap-6. Every pixel utilized.
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: Subtle roundness, max 8px (rounded-md or rounded-lg). Avoid excessive softness. Use sharp edges where appropriate.
layout_and_spacing.shadows: Minimal. Avoid large soft shadows. Use 1px solid strokes (border-border) to define surfaces instead of relying solely on shadows. If shadow is used, keep it shadow-sm.
layout_and_spacing.surfaces: Neumorphism (Tactile) variant: Flat solid backgrounds with 1px border. No glassmorphism in this dashboard to keep data highly readable.

components.navigation: Left sidebar panel-type navigation. Clear buttons with icons. Selected state should use the primary color (Warm Orange) with a subtle background tint.
components.forms_and_inputs: Shadcn UI Input, Select, etc. Left-align labels. Clear focus states with ring-2 ring-primary/50.
components.tables: Shadcn Data Tables. Cardless or minimal rectangular style. Zebra striping or subtle hover states (hover:bg-surface_hover) to track rows. No horizontal scrollbars if possible (use responsive grids or sticky columns).
components.buttons: Flat, strong colors. Primary CTA in #E85D04 text-white. Avoid ghost buttons for main actions; use subtle outlined buttons for secondary actions.
components.charts: Recharts. Use warm palette (Orange, Red, Yellow) and Earthy Green for positive metrics. Tooltips must have dark contrast.

modules.name: HOME
modules.description: Welcome screen with quick access to modules and daily summaries (purchases, production, waste, low stock, most used products).

modules.name: PURCHASE REGISTRATION
modules.description: Register all business purchases. Includes date, product, category, supplier, quantity, unit, equivalence, unit price, total price, observation. Shows price history tracking with up/down arrows (success/destructive colors).

modules.name: PRODUCTION REGISTRATION & RECIPES
modules.description: Register daily prepared products. Includes 'Recipe Management' to configure recipes from scratch. Auto-deducts raw materials and increments cooked inventory based on predefined recipes.

modules.name: WASTE REGISTRATION
modules.description: Register waste for both raw materials and cooked products with cost estimation. Auto-deducts stock.

modules.name: RAW MATERIAL INVENTORY
modules.description: Shows all raw ingredients grouped by categories (pollo, verduras, papa, arroces y granos, etc.). Automatic unit conversion.

modules.name: COOKED PRODUCT INVENTORY
modules.description: Shows prepared products ready for sale.

modules.name: DASHBOARD
modules.description: Analytics KPIs: daily/weekly/monthly purchase spending, waste losses, most purchased/consumed products, production cost estimation, price variation products, low stock alerts, recommendations.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: ALWAYS explicitly set text color on hover (e.g., hover:bg-orange-600 hover:text-white). Button hovers slightly darken.
motion_and_interactions.transitions: Use specific properties (transition-colors duration-200 ease-in-out). No transition-all.
motion_and_interactions.entrance: Staggered fade-in for table rows or dashboard widgets (framer-motion). Minimalist feedback.

icons.strategy: Consistent stroke width. Use warm primary color for active/highlighted icons, neutral for inactive.

images.strategy: Minimal image usage, focused on dashboard metrics. Can use contextual imagery in empty states or Home welcome banner.

testing.attributes: All interactive elements must include data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='save-purchase-button', data-testid='home-nav-link').

instructions_to_main_agent: Use standard Tailwind classes matching the defined color hexes by extending tailwind.config.js.
Apply 'Outfit' for all headings and 'DM Sans' for body text. Update Google Fonts import in index.css.
Implement Shadcn UI components for Tables, Dialogs, Selects, and Forms.
Ensure the interface is entirely in Spanish, with Peruvian Soles (S/.) as the currency.
The layout must have a left sidebar for the 7 modules, avoiding a top-only navbar to maintain dashboard 'control room' feel.
Recipe Management should be integrated within or alongside Production Registration to allow starting recipes from scratch.
